title: LLP Registration in Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Register an LLP in Mumbai with Virtual Auditor. CA-assisted FiLLiP filing, customised LLP Agreement, DPIN procurement.
bodyText:
Looking for LLP registration in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor provides complete Limited Liability Partnership registration services in Mumbai, led by CA V. Viswanathan — Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) and Associate Company Secretary (ACS). From name reservation through LLP Agreement filing, we handle every step.

What is LLP Registration?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Certificate of Incorporation as LLP from the Registrar of Companies (ROC Mumbai). LLP Identification Number (LLPIN) allotment. PAN and TAN for the LLP. Customised LLP Agreement drafted to reflect your profit-sharing ratio, capital contribution, rights and duties of partners, and exit provisions. DSC and DPIN procurement for all designated partners. Post-registration compliance checklist — annual return (Form 11), statement of accounts (Form 8), and income tax return due dates.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for LLP Registration in Mumbai
  An LLP offers limited liability protection with the flexibility of a partnership and lower compliance burden than a Pvt Ltd company. Virtual Auditor helps you decide whether LLP is the right structure for your business — we compare LLP vs Pvt Ltd vs Partnership across tax implications, compliance costs, fundraising ability, and liability exposure. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS) drafts customised LLP Agreements (not templates), ensuring your partner rights, capital contributions, and profit-sharing arrangements are properly documented. Our Mumbai office handles ROC Mumbai coordination for any queries. We also handle conversion from existing partnership firms or proprietorships to LLP under Chapter X of the LLP Act, 2008.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Consultation — entity structure advisory, LLP vs Pvt Ltd comparison, partner pattern planning. Step 2: DSC and DPIN procurement for all designated partners. Step 3: Name reservation through RUN-LLP service on MCA portal. Step 4: LLP Agreement drafting — customised to your specific business, capital, and governance requirements. Step 5: FiLLiP (Form for incorporation of LLP) filing with MCA. Step 6: Certificate of Incorporation issued — typically 5-8 working days. Step 7: LLP Agreement filing (Form 3) within 30 days, PAN/TAN application, bank account opening support.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Ready to register your LLP in Mumbai? Contact Virtual Auditor:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Fixed-fee pricing. No hidden charges. LLP Certificate in 5-8 working days.

faqs.q: How long does LLP registration take in Mumbai?
faqs.a: 5-8 working days from FiLLiP filing. Total timeline including DPIN, DSC, and name reservation: 8-12 working days. Contact us at +91-77000 89597 for exact timeline.

faqs.q: What is the difference between LLP and Private Limited Company?
faqs.a: LLP offers limited liability with lower compliance (no statutory audit if turnover < Rs 40 lakhs, no board meetings). However, LLPs cannot raise equity funding from VCs/PEs. Choose Pvt Ltd if you plan to raise investment; choose LLP for professional practices and businesses not seeking equity capital.

faqs.q: Can an existing partnership convert to LLP in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Yes. Chapter X of the LLP Act allows conversion of partnership firms to LLP without dissolution. All assets, liabilities, and contracts transfer automatically. We handle the complete conversion process.
